comment: AGS DLL modules compile before all C_PROJECT modules. Source: CI-CD-Strategy.md section 'Build Sequence Rules'. AGS modules (cug*) produce DLLs that dialog/comwin EXEs link against at compile time.
Comwin DLL modules compile before dialog EXE modules. Source: CI-CD-Strategy.md. Dialog EXEs link against comwin DLLs — comwin must exist first.
Shared common libraries compile before dialog and comwin. Source: CI-CD-Strategy.md + confirmed by Alan Chin (meeting 05/20). Common libs are lowest-level dependencies.
COBOL service programs compile before batch programs at deploy time. Source: CI-CD-Strategy.md. Batch programs call service copybooks — services must be compiled first.
